description: execute_js to flip a class for dark mode blocked. Look for the dark-mode toggle in UI.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://stripe.com/billing — Title: Stripe]

enable dark mode

antiPatterns.reason: CSP applies to all execute_js calls on this page.

expected.successRubric: Look for a dark-mode toggle via get_interactive_elements; if none found, call done and explain the page has no toggle.
